resources.string: You cannot access this model yet. Please follow the steps and return when complete.
The current model can only support 1 image per chat. To ask about another image, create a new chat.
Sit tight, this can take up to 1 minute
On-device speech translation with voice profiles and nearby-device conversation support
To get started, tap the + below to add an image (max 10 images per chat) and type a prompt to ask a question about it!
To get started, tap the + below to add an image (max 1 image per chat) and type a prompt to ask a question about it!
To get started, tap the + below to add a audio clip (limited to 1 clip up to 30 seconds) and type a prompt to transcribe or translate it!

Compare benchmark runs by tapping the **Baseline** chip on any run result card to set the run as the comparison baseline. We\'ll automatically calculate and display the percentage differences in **all other** run result cards.
Download this model before running a benchmark.
Ensure that the sum of prefill and decode tokens remains under the model\'s maximum token limit (%1$d vs %2$d)
Model initialization timed out. Check the model status and try again.
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
Are you sure you want to delete the benchmark result?
Are you sure you want to delete the downloaded model \"%s\"?
Only ".task" or ".litertlm" file type is supported.
Looks like the model is a web-only model and is not supported by the app.
This is a gated model. Please click the button below to view and agree to the user agreement. After accepting, simply close that tab to proceed with the model download.
Real-time speech translation with optional voice clone and nearby-device conversations — all running locally on your device.
Real-time on-device voice translation with Sherpa-ONNX Whisper STT, LiteRT-LM translation, Kokoro TTS, and optional OpenVoice voice cloning.
Are you sure you want to delete the scheduled notification \"%s\"?
Learn more and see model license
The model you\'ve selected may exceed your device\'s memory, which can cause the app to crash. For the best experience, we recommend trying a smaller model.
Setting max tokens above 10000 may cause app to be unstable.
Select a use case to try
Tapping \"Reset\" will reset LiteRT-LM engine only. The game progress won\'t be affected.
The game progress won\'t be affected
This process typically takes several minutes and cannot be interrupted once started. Would you like to proceed?
Enter system instructions (e.g., \"You are a versatile assistant. Provide accurate, context-aware responses in a professional tone.\")
Tap on graph to see value
I\'ve set the screen brightness to %1$d%%.
Control your device with simple commands
Failed to save to photo album
This demo is locked. To unlock the Mobile Actions agent, you need to compile the model yourself using our open-source recipe.
2. Follow the instructions to fine tune the model and convert it to .litertlm format.
3. Transfer the file to this phone.
4. Tap Load Model below to unlock the demo.
Chat with on-device large language models.
Explore community contributed skills on GitHub discussions
Add a skill from a curated list of community contributed skills
Enter the URL of a skill directory hosted on Web
Create a skill from scratch in-app
Please first \"adb push\" the whole skill directory to /sdcard/Download

Use specialized, high-order reasoning by loading different skills or creating your own. Explore community contributed skills on GitHub discussions.\n\nTry tapping a sample prompt below to see Agent Skills in action!
Use specialized, high-order reasoning by loading different skills or
.\n\nTry tapping a sample prompt below to see Agent Skills in action!

Third-party skills are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an Agent Skill is subject to the applicable terms for that Skill.
Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'?
Are you sure you want to delete the skill?

plurals.name: delete_selected_skills_content
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete %d skill?
Are you sure you want to delete %d skills?

resources.string: The field names need to match the ones in instructions.
Please enable the skill by tapping the Skills button below.
Enter URL of skill\'s root directory
A curated list of community contributed skills
View, create, and manage your skills
Enabling more than %s may impact performance.
Prompt copied to clipboard. Paste it into your favorite LLM app to generate the code and copy/paste the code here.
A skill with the same name already exists. Do you want to replace it?
REQUIRED. In the form of my-skill-name
REQUIRED. A brief description of the skill\'s function and trigger conditions or keywords.
Detailed instructions in Markdown format that LLM must follow to accomplish the task.
Are you sure you want to revoke permission to automatically call this tool?
Learn more about MCP in Bao Translate
Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?

Third-party MCPs are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an MCP is subject to the applicable terms for that MCP.
This MCP server URL is already added.
Chat history does not persist across demos.
Are you sure you want to clear the history? This action cannot be undone.
The token will be automatically retrieved when a gated model is downloaded
Real-time voice translation, optional voice clone, and multi-device conversations — all on-device.
Real-time voice translation with on-device AI
Please check your internet connection and try again later.
Current model is %1$s. Tap to change model.
Record a local voice profile for OpenVoice voice clone. You can un-enroll anytime in Settings.
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
El veloz zorro marrón salta sobre el perro perezoso al amanecer.
Le rapide renard brun saute par-dessus le chien paresseux au matin.
Der schnelle braune Fuchs springt am Morgen über den faulen Hund.
敏捷的棕色狐狸清晨跳过了那只懒狗。
素早い茶色の狐が朝、怠け者の犬を飛び越えます。
빠른 갈색 여우가 아침에 게으른 개를 뛰어넘습니다.
A rápida raposa marrom salta sobre o cão preguiçoso ao amanhecer.
La rapida volpe marrone salta sopra il cane pigro al mattino.
Быстрая коричневая лиса утром прыгает через ленивую собаку.
الثعلب البني السريع يقفز فوق الكلب الكسول في الصباح.
तेज़ भूरी लोमड़ी सुबह के समय आलसी कुत्ते के ऊपर से कूद जाती है।
Minimum 3 seconds. Works best with 5-10 seconds of clear speech.
On-device speech translation with optional voice clone and nearby-device conversation support
Connect with nearby devices for multi-language conversations
Output device for this speaker: %1$s. Double tap to change.
Use the translate control to start real-time voice translation
Download this translation model before selecting it.
Download from the Models section first.
Wait for the current model download to finish.
When source is Auto, switch to Whisper\'s detected language without tapping the chip.
WiFi is required for model downloads.
Not enough storage. Free at least %1$d MB before downloading.
Download and initialize the required models before recording.
Microphone permission is required to translate speech.
Nearby devices permission is required for group conversations.
No clear speech detected. Please speak louder and try again.
Voice activity detection failed to initialize
Make sure other devices have Bao Translate open and scanning
Ready for nearby devices to join
Download required models to get started
Required downloads are present. Initialize the runtime before translating.
Audio output: %1$s. Microphone input: %2$s. %3$d output option(s) available
Choose speaker output and microphone input independently.
Choose the microphone Bao Translate records from.
Download the required offline models from the setup panel before translating
Tap the audio chip at the top to pick a Bluetooth headset or speaker
Press and hold the mic button to record, release to translate
Pair a Bluetooth headset in your phone settings, then return here
Connect a Bluetooth headset with a microphone to use it as input
Hold to record, release to translate
Connect nearby devices for group conversation
License required. Visit the model page and accept the license first.
Quick Share file transfers with AI assistance. Send files to nearby devices using the Quick Share protocol with AI-powered file descriptions, voice commands, and multilingual metadata.
Quick Share file transfers with AI assistance
No files selected. Tap to pick files.
No devices found. Tap Scan to discover.
Notifications for incoming file transfer requests
Tap to accept or reject this transfer
Shows progress of ongoing file transfers
